cron_expression.description: For a recurring reminder: a 5-field cron expression (e.g. '0 9 * * 1' = Mondays 9am). May fire at most 4 times per day. Mutually exclusive with recurrence_interval.

end_date.description: Optional: recurring reminders stop (status=completed) after this time.

id.description: A UUID string identifying this reminder.

message.description: Optional longer body for the notification.

organization.description: ID of the organization this reminder belongs to. You must be a member of it.

recurrence_interval.description:
For a recurring reminder: daily, weekly, monthly, or yearly.

* `daily` - Daily
* `weekly` - Weekly
* `monthly` - Monthly
* `yearly` - Yearly

resource_id.description: ID of the referenced resource; must exist in the chosen project.

resource_type.description: Optional PostHog resource this reminder is about. One of: dashboard, insight, experiment, feature_flag, survey, notebook, replay, error_tracking. Resources are project-scoped, so a team must be set when this is provided.

scheduled_at.description: For a one-off reminder: when it should fire (ISO 8601, future).

team.description: Optional ID of the project this reminder is scoped to. Required when targeting a specific resource. Must belong to the chosen organization.

timezone.description: IANA timezone the schedule resolves in (e.g. 'America/New_York'). Defaults to the project timezone when a team is set, otherwise UTC.

title.description: Short text shown as the notification title when the reminder fires.
